examples: The only way to break the pressures on both mental health services and schools is to reinvest in early intervention services inside schools.
How much of your profits will you reinvest in your materials and supplies?
For me the money that I earn online, I use it to reinvest on my network and campaigns.
The Chinese save over 30% of their income, which gives them much more to reinvest in their country.
Those businesses will have capital to reinvest at the first sign of market recovery.
